programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.sub-title: You Can't Go to Church With Us
programme.desc: Following the lives of powerhouse boss Leva Bonaparte and her staff at Republic Garden & Lounge, the hottest nightclub in Charleston, South Carolina.

programme.title: Watch What Happens Live With Andy Cohen
programme.desc: Andy Cohen interviews Ella Stiller and Zack Wickham.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: Love and tension collide on the way to San Diego as relationships are tested.

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.sub-title: You Can't Go to Church With Us
programme.desc: Following the lives of powerhouse boss Leva Bonaparte and her staff at Republic Garden & Lounge, the hottest nightclub in Charleston, South Carolina.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Rhode Island
programme.desc: The group spends the weekend in Newport mansion; Alicia plans a tea party with some unusual guests that leave the women with a lot of questions; Liz hosts a masquerade dinner where truths are revealed; Kelsey shocks the ladies with news about her relationship and confronts Rosie about some rumors.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta
programme.desc: Celebrations sour in Dallas when room drama and fresh conflict shake the group.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Below Deck Down Under
programme.sub-title: Head of the Deck; Stew Department
programme.desc: Chef Ben and Jenna try to take their flirtations to the next level, but Eddy's jealousy and Mike's interference get in the way. After Mike crosses a line with Daisy, tensions explode across the boat. Crew gossip sparks a room swap.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Kelly Clarkson Show
programme.desc: Cameoke: "I'll Take You"; Goldie Hawn; "Celebrity Superlatives"; Daniel Dae Kim; Teacher of the Year 2026; Anna Konkle.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Unlock: I Went to Jail, You Went Cheating!; Mom, I'm Not Your Online Bully!
programme.desc: While Johnathan was in jail, he says, he and his fiancée, Natasha, agreed to stay faithful, yet he suspects she hasn't kept her promise; Tamertha says she's being bullied online by her own daughter, Teesiah, and she hopes Karamo can help them repair their broken relationship.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Rachel hosts a dinner party featuring a clairvoyant's seance, which emotionally affects Amanda, prompting her to seek Kyle's support; Dorrit believes she does nothing wrong.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: The tension continues at Dorit and Erika's birthday dinner as Kyle is pulled into the middle of Amanda and Dorit's drama. Rachel's tough exterior finally cracks. Sutton is put in the hot seat when Dorit calls her out for not having her back. Boz receives a heartbreaking update on her fertility journey.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Dorit sits down with Mauricio in hopes of breaking through to PK; Sutton gets emotional while opening up to her daughter about her name change.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.sub-title: The Cult's Out of the Bag
programme.desc: Rachel finally gets her wish with a Hot Girl Summer at a Hamptons club. Kyle and Dorit put their problems aside to enjoy the vibe. Boz and Sutton want to get to know the real Amanda, who finally sheds light on a tough time in her past. Erika and Sutton dine with Denise, who opens up about her volatile divorce. Erika stuns the table with a revelation of her own.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Sutton and Jennifer Tilly weigh in on a new, but all-too-familiar woman from Sutton's past; Erika revisits a painful chapter of her life; Boz and Lael travel down to San Diego to visit Keely.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: After smooth sailing in the Hamptons, tensions rise when Dorit discovers Kyle has been talking behind her back; Rachel sits her boys down to discuss her divorce; Amanda throws herself into planning her extravagant wedding; Boz invites the girls to join her on a trip to Italy at a bellissimo Tuscan villa where Sutton learns that no good deed goes unpunished.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Bozoma pulls out all the stops for the first night in Italy, including a surprise operatic performance; Erika questions Sutton's motive for choosing Amanda as her roommate; Amanda's attempt to smooth things over with Dorit leads to frustration from Kyle and Sutton; Rachel receives a troubling text from home.

programme.desc: As the Italian getaway heats up, Sutton alerts Amanda to comments being made behind her back; Amanda fires back when Boz questions her authenticity; Rachel makes it clear she doesn't need anyone speaking for her.

programme.title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
programme.desc: Adaptation of the first of J.K. Rowling's popular children's novels about Harry Potter, a boy who learns on his eleventh birthday that he is the orphaned son of two powerful wizards and possesses unique magical powers of his own. He is summoned from his life as an unwanted child to become a student at Hogwarts, an English boarding school for wizards. There, he meets several friends who become his closest allies and help him discover the truth about his parents' mysterious deaths.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Summer House
programme.desc: Summer House invites viewers to spend the sunny season with a wild group of friends in one of the most exclusive beach areas on the East Coast.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Kelly Clarkson Show
programme.desc: Kellyoke: "The Way It Is"; Sally Field; "Scenes and Stories"; Lewis Pullman; Duckhorn Wine demo; Gloria Harrison-Hall (book "Glow").

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Unlock: 2 Unlocks & a Funeral; Truth: Was I Robbed of Raising You?
programme.desc: Geleah is engaged to Tony, but she says their relationship has been in constant turmoil, while he says she is cheating and projecting her own behavior onto him; Antwan believed he was Chapre's father and was ready to take on that role, despite having doubts about her paternity, but now, he says, he regrets being robbed of her childhood.

programme.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programme.desc: Capt. Glenn is hopeful Colin's plan to fix the engine works; chef Ileisha has problems at dinner; the guests blame Daisy for the lack of service.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programme.desc: Capt. Glenn finally wakes up to some good news; the entire crew is invited to join the guests for dinner, and chef Ileisha must change her menu in the last minute.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programme.desc: Capt. Glenn insists a stew go on all excursions; Daisy is frustrated after learning she's a stew down while the deck team goofed off on the eFoils; chef Ileisha's perfectionism is thrown off when she faces her greatest fear in the galley.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets
programme.desc: The follow-up to "Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone" finds young wizard Harry Potter and his friends, Ron and Hermione, facing new challenges during their second year at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry as they try to discover a dark force that is terrorizing the school.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban
programme.desc: Harry Potter's third year at Hogwarts starts off badly when he learns deranged killer Sirius Black has escaped from Azkaban prison and is bent on murdering the teenage wizard. While Hermione's cat torments Ron's sickly rat, causing a rift among the trio, a swarm of nasty Dementors is sent to protect the school from Black. A mysterious new teacher helps Harry learn to defend himself, but what is his secret tie to Sirius Black?

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board

programme.title: Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire
programme.desc: During Harry's fourth year at Hogwarts a competition will be held between three schools of wizardry, and contestants will be magically chosen for the very dangerous event.
